allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add artist performance reports and batch payment management system

This commit implements a comprehensive artist management system including:

## Artist Performance Reports
- New ArtistPerformanceController with performance analytics
- Artist performance view with 4 metric cards (gigs, contracts, gross cash, net payout)
- Expandable table grouped by artist showing detailed financial breakdowns
- PDF export functionality
- Date range and artist filters
- Updated sidebar with expandable Artists menu (List + Performance)

## Batch Payment Management for Artists
- settleBatchArtistPayments() method for mass payment processing
- unsettleBatchArtistPayments() method for payment reversal
- Business rules validation:
  * Only realized events can be paid
  * All costs must be confirmed before payment
  * Cannot pay already paid events
  * Payment date cannot be in the future
- Transaction-based processing with rollback on errors
- Settlement record management with settlement_date field

## Enhanced Financial Closing Interface
- Expandable expenses subtable with detailed breakdown
- Inline status toggle for confirming/unconfirming expenses
- Visual highlighting for events with pending costs
- Batch selection with "select all" functionality
- Real-time counter showing selected events
- Date picker for payment date
- SweetAlert2 confirmation dialogs
- Direct links to gig details from Local/Evento column

## Testing
- 10 comprehensive unit tests (100% passing - 50 assertions)
- Tests cover all validation rules and edge cases
- Proper factories usage for test data generation

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed relationship name in gigs-table.blade.php (costs → gigCosts)
- Added missing settlement_date field to Settlement creation

Routes added:
- POST /artists/payments/settle-batch
- PATCH /artists/payments/unsettle-batch
- GET /reports/artist-performance
- GET /reports/artist-performance/export

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
